---

name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the Shop Billing System
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
-------------

# ✨ Feature Request

## 📋 Summary

Provide a clear and concise summary of the feature or enhancement.

---

## 🎯 Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve.

Example:

> It is difficult to quickly find products because barcode scanning is not currently available.

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution.

Example:

> Add barcode scanner support to allow products to be searched automatically by scanning their barcode.

---

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you have considered.

---

## 🌟 Benefits

Explain how this feature would improve the project.

Examples:

* Improves user experience
* Saves time
* Reduces manual work
* Enhances productivity
* Improves application performance

---

## 📸 Mockups / Screenshots (Optional)

Attach screenshots, UI mockups, wireframes, or diagrams if available.

---

## 🧩 Additional Information

Provide any additional context, references, or implementation ideas.

Examples:

* Similar feature in another application
* Helpful documentation
* Related GitHub issues
* External libraries that may help

---

## 🚀 Priority

Select the priority of this feature.

* [ ] Low
* [ ] Medium
* [ ] High
* [ ] Critical

---

## 🏷️ Affected Module(s)

Select all modules that apply.

* [ ] Authentication
* [ ] Dashboard
* [ ] Billing
* [ ] Products
* [ ] Customers
* [ ] Inventory
* [ ] Reports
* [ ] Settings
* [ ] Database
* [ ] API
* [ ] Documentation
* [ ] User Interface
* [ ] Performance
* [ ] Security
* [ ] Other

---

## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting this feature request:

* [ ] I searched existing issues and feature requests.
* [ ] This feature has not already been requested.
* [ ] I clearly described the problem.
* [ ] I explained why this feature would be useful.
* [ ] I provided sufficient details.

---

## 🙌 Thank You

Thank you for taking the time to suggest a new feature for the **Shop Billing System**.

Your ideas help make this project better for everyone!
